system.description:
A faster, more precise version of Augury — only one minute required instead of 30. Uses the same degree of success table: DoS 0 = greatest opposition; DoS 2 = fears in play equal to PR; DoS 4 = greatest advantage at hand; DoS 6+ = two sentences of advice, granting the subject a +10 bonus to a number of Tests equal to Psy Rating for the next month or until the question is resolved. Psychic Phenomena rolls provoked add +10.

Focus Power Test: Psyniscience

Prerequisites: Augury

XP Cost: 200
